
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dog|kanji=丙戌|romaji=hinoe inu|onyomi=heijutsu|p=bǐxū|w=ping-hsü|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ɕy|y=bing2 seot1|j=bing2 seot1|ci=pɪŋ sœt̚|mc=pæŋ syt|oc-bs=praŋ ssu|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as 丙戌''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|qid=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Otsuyō|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Dinghai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dinghai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Dog (zodiac)|en|Dog (zodiac)|qid=Q755126|lt=Dog (戌)|1=Dog (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|qid=Q4697552|lt=Mutual Generation|1=Aioi}} (Fire produces Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Dog (丙戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-inu
***Onyomi 1: heiju
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsul (병술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Tuất

==Years of Yang Fire Dog==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 26 when divided by 60 is a year of Bingu.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Bingu'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 26|en|AD 26|qid=Q23774|lt=26 AD|1=AD 26}}
* {{ill|AD 86|en|AD 86|qid=Q30477|lt=86 AD|1=AD 86}}
* {{ill|AD 146|en|AD 146|qid=Q31372|lt=146 AD|1=AD 146}}
* {{ill|206|en|206|qid=Q30819|lt=206 AD|1=206}}
* {{ill|266|en|266|qid=Q32109|lt=266 AD|1=266}}
* {{ill|326|en|326|qid=Q34056|lt=326 AD|1=326}}
* {{ill|386|en|386|qid=Q34118|lt=386 AD|1=386}}
* {{ill|446|en|446|qid=Q31076|lt=446 AD|1=446}}
* {{ill|506|en|506|qid=Q32909|lt=506 AD|1=506}}
* {{ill|566|en|566|qid=Q32609|lt=566 AD|1=566}}
* {{ill|626|en|626|qid=Q31052|lt=626 AD|1=626}}
* {{ill|686|en|686|qid=Q30619|lt=686 AD|1=686}}
* {{ill|746|en|746|qid=Q23616|lt=746 AD|1=746}}
* {{ill|806|en|806|qid=Q30021|lt=806 AD|1=806}}
* {{ill|866|en|866|qid=Q23872|lt=866 AD|1=866}}
* {{ill|926|en|926|qid=Q24369|lt=926 AD|1=926}}
* {{ill|986|en|986|qid=Q23785|lt=986 AD|1=986}}
|
* {{ill|1046|en|1046|qid=Q19354|lt=1046 AD|1=1046}}
* {{ill|1106|en|1106|qid=Q19508|lt=1106 AD|1=1106}}
* {{ill|1166|en|1166|qid=Q19677|lt=1166 AD|1=1166}}
* {{ill|1226|en|1226|qid=Q5405|lt=1226 AD|1=1226}}
* {{ill|1286|en|1286|qid=Q5548|lt=1286 AD|1=1286}}
* {{ill|1346|en|1346|qid=Q6080|lt=1346 AD|1=1346}}
* {{ill|1406|en|1406|qid=Q6129|lt=1406 AD|1=1406}}
* {{ill|1466|en|1466|qid=Q6559|lt=1466 AD|1=1466}}
* {{ill|1526|en|1526|qid=Q6325|lt=1526 AD|1=1526}}
* {{ill|1586|en|1586|qid=Q6739|lt=1586 AD|1=1586}}
* {{ill|1646|en|1646|qid=Q6930|lt=1646 AD|1=1646}}
* {{ill|1706|en|1706|qid=Q6835|lt=1706 AD|1=1706}}
* {{ill|1766|en|1766|qid=Q7669|lt=1766 AD|1=1766}}
* {{ill|1826|en|1826|qid=Q7004|lt=1826 AD|1=1826}}
* {{ill|1886|en|1886|qid=Q7822|lt=1886 AD|1=1886}}
* {{ill|1946|en|1946|qid=Q18610|lt=1946 AD|1=1946}}
|
* {{ill|2006|en|2006|qid=Q2021|lt=2006 AD|1=2006}}
* {{ill|2066 AD|ja|2066年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2066|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2066 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2060年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2126 AD|ja|2126年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2126|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2126 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2186 AD|ja|2186年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2186|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2186 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2246 AD|ja|2246年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2246|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2246 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2306 AD|ja|2306年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2306|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2306 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2366 AD|ja|2366年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2366|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2366 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2426 AD|ja|2426年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2426|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2426 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2486 AD|ja|2486年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2486|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2486 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2546 AD|ja|2546年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2546|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2546 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2606 AD|ja|2606年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2606|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2606 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2666 AD|ja|2666年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2666|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2666 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2726 AD|ja|2726年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2726|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2726 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2786 AD|ja|2786年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2786|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2786 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2846 AD|ja|2846年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2846|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2846 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2906 AD|ja|2906年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2906|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2906 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2966 AD|ja|2966年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2966|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2966 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are either {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|qid=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|qid=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|qid=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of {{ill|Tenpōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405067}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Fire Dog|qq=ja|丙戌|version=98658021|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062512|af|Vuurhond (astrologie)|cdo|Bīng-sáe̤k|de|Feuer-Hund|fr|Chien de feu|hak|Piáng-sut|ja|丙戌|ko|병술|nds|Füür-Hund|vi|Bính Tuất|za|Bingjswt|zh-min-nan|Péng-sut|zh-yue|丙戌|zh|丙戌|zh-min-nan|Pêng-chún|cdo|Bîng-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Hundvi|de|Yang Fire Dog|af|Vuurchond (astrologie)|de|Feuer-Hundeen|en|Fire Dog|fr|Chien de feushak|it|Bing-chṳ́id|za|Bingceij|ar|Yang Fire Dog}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
